name: Lieutenant Commander Robert Hayes
publicFace: A precise, methodical officer who keeps the Cony's deck log with the accuracy of a man who knows that every entry is a potential exhibit in a future inquiry.
privateGoal: To ensure that whatever happens tonight, the Cony's actions are defensible under the rules of engagement — he is the ship's institutional memory and its legal conscience.
fear: That Estocin's informal escalation order from the task force admiral will surface in a post-crisis review and implicate the entire ship.
knowledge: He has logged all three signaling charge drops with precise coordinates and times — including the third drop, which he noted was 12 meters inside the minimum safe-distance protocol.
He intercepted a task force broadcast thirty minutes ago indicating that at least one of the four Soviet submarines may be carrying 'special ordnance' — a classification he has not yet shown Estocin.

The international surfacing signal, if broadcast on the correct frequency, is legally binding under the 1958 Geneva Convention on the High Seas — a fact that gives the Cony a diplomatic tool Estocin has not used.
voice: The careful, subordinate language of a man who has learned to phrase disagreement as a question — 'Have we considered, sir...' — so that the record shows due diligence without direct insubordination.
trustLogic: Hayes responds to players who engage with procedure and documentation — he is most useful when asked specific questions about what has been logged, what the orders actually say, and what the legal options are.
secrets: He has already drafted a formal protest memo regarding the third depth charge's proximity — a document he has not filed because doing so would directly contradict his captain in writing.

He has been quietly monitoring the emergency frequency and believes he heard a partial Soviet transmission that could be a distress signal — but he cannot confirm it without better equipment than the Cony carries.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: He produces the deck log and reads the relevant entry aloud, neither confirming nor denying the implication.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: He asks whether the questioner wants him to file a formal report — making clear that he will, if asked, and that it will say exactly what happened.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not act against Estocin directly. He will document, he will advise, he will question — but he will not relieve his captain or countermand an order.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: He produces every document in his possession and reads them in chronological order.

represents: US Navy executive officers aboard destroyers participating in the naval quarantine of Cuba, October 1962
